title: erigeron serpentinus
intro: Erigeron serpentinus, also known as Mountain Fleabane, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Native American medicine, where it was used to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Erigeron serpentinus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin, as well as its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Erigeron serpentinus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
